description_long: This is a red Coca-Cola can with a classic cylindrical shape and a slightly tapered top and bottom. The can features the iconic white Coca-Cola script logo prominently displayed on the front, with additional branding and nutritional information on the back. The surface is metallic and glossy, reflecting light and giving it a sleek appearance. The top of the can is silver with a standard pull-tab opening mechanism. The can appears to be made of aluminum, with a thin printed label and is likely filled with carbonated liquid. There are no visible dents, scratches, or signs of wear on the exterior.
description: A glossy red Coca-Cola can with white branding, metallic finish, and a standard pull-tab top.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large white Coca-Cola logo on a red background.
description_view_1: Angled view with the Coca-Cola logo and part of the pull-tab top visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying nutritional information, barcode, and product details.
description_view_3: Side-rear view showing recycling symbols, part of the logo, and more product text.
attribute_label_or_branding: Large white Coca-Cola script logo on the front, smaller text with nutritional information, barcode, and recycling symbols on the back, all in white and green on a red background.
